title: Dark Roasted Australian Lamb Roast
description: A tender and flavorful lamb roast with a rich wine sauce, topped with melted cheese slices, perfect for a midnight craving. This Whole30-friendly dish is a classic Australian recipe.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb roast with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb roast on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the garlic, red wine, and beef broth to the Dutch oven.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
Remove the lamb from the oven and top with cheese slices.
Return the lamb to the oven and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
